Package org.aavso.tools.vstar.ui.dialog

Class TextArea

java.lang.Object
org.aavso.tools.vstar.ui.dialog.TextArea
All Implemented Interfaces:
ITextComponent<String>
public class TextArea extends Object implements ITextComponent<String>
This class encapsulates the name and value of a text area along with a GUI textArea and methods to operate upon it.

  • Constructor Summary

    Description

    Construct a writable field with no initial value that cannot be empty.

  • Constructor Details

    • TextArea

      public TextArea(String name, String initialValue, int rows, int cols, boolean readOnly, boolean canBeEmpty)
      Constructor.
      Parameters:
      name - The area's name.
      initialValue - The area's initial value.
      rows - The number of rows in this text area; 0 means don't set.
      cols - The number of rows in this text area; 0 means don't set.
      readOnly - Is this area read-only?
      canBeEmpty - Can this area be empty?

    • TextArea

      public TextArea(String name, String initialValue, int rows, int cols)
      Construct a writable field with no initial value that cannot be empty.

      initialValue - The field's initial value.
      rows - The number of rows in this text area; 0 means don't set.
      cols - The number of rows in this text area; 0 means don't set.
